runway.unknown: Runway unknown — set your monthly salary

expenses.empty: Nothing matches these filters — add an expense or loosen a filter.

savings.emptyBody: This page is where you keep an eye on your savings. Log a “deposit” when you set money aside, and a “returns” movement when your account pays interest — your balance and growth chart build up from there. Add your first movement to get started.
savings.noReturns: No returns logged yet — when your account pays interest, log it as a "returns" movement and it will chart here.

summary.locked: {{year}} hasn't started yet — its Year in Review will be here when it does.

dashboard.loadError: Couldn't load this month. Please try again.
dashboard.msiEmpty: Register an installment purchase and every monthly charge is logged for you.
dashboard.savingsEmpty: Log a deposit or the interest your account produced to track growth and runway.

validation.amountPositive: Amount must be greater than zero

registerMsi.noCreditCard: Installment plans live on credit cards — add a credit card first.
registerMsi.regenNote: Saving regenerates the installment schedule from the new values.

delete.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
delete.transaction: This removes the movement from its month and every total. This can't be undone.
delete.savings: This removes the movement and recalculates your savings balance. This can't be undone.
delete.msiPlan_one: This also deletes the plan's {{count}} installment transaction. This can't be undone.
delete.msiPlan_other: This also deletes the plan's {{count}} installment transactions. This can't be undone.
delete.cardInUseSuffix: . Delete or move them first — deleting the card would orphan your history.
delete.cardNotInUse: The card/account will be removed. This can't be undone.

monthDetail.empty: Nothing logged this month yet — add an expense or income to see it here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.averageSalaryHint: Used to estimate your runway. Leave blank to hide it.
settings.themeLockedHint: Sign in to unlock premium themes.
settings.themeUnavailable: Premium themes need cloud sign-in, which isn't set up on this build.
settings.aboutText: High Count — a safe and efficient personal finance tracker.
settings.modeLocal: Local — saved on this device only.
settings.modeCloud: Signed in as {{email}} — synced to the cloud.
settings.cloudDisabled: Cloud sync isn't set up on this build.
settings.backupHint: A portable JSON copy of all your data — same format locally or in the cloud.
settings.importInvalid: That file isn't a valid High Count backup.
settings.deleteAllHint: Permanently erase all your accounts, transactions, savings, and plans. This can't be undone.
settings.deleteScopeLocal: This erases everything stored locally on this device.
settings.deleteScopeCloud: This erases everything in your cloud account ({{email}}).
settings.alsoWipeLocal: Also erase the local copy on this device
settings.deleteAccountHint: Permanently delete your account and everything in it — cloud and on this device. This can't be undone, and signing back in later starts a brand-new empty account.
settings.deleteAccountScope: This deletes the account {{email}} and all of its data everywhere.

auth.toSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.checkEmail: Almost there — check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.

confirm.title: Check your inbox
confirm.body: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Click it to verify your account, and we'll bring you right into setup.
confirm.hint: Didn't get it? Check your spam folder, or resend below.

onboarding.nameSubtitle: So we can make this little money corner feel like yours.
onboarding.cardsJoke: Relax — we're not here to sell you a credit card. We just need to know where your money hangs out so we can keep an eye on it.
onboarding.expenseTitle: Now, a little something you spent
onboarding.expenseBody: Go on — add something you bought recently. Tiny habit, big payoff.
onboarding.congratsBody: That's it — you now know how to take care of your money. And this is only the beginning.

deposit.title: How much have you got right now?
deposit.body: Drop in what you have today and we'll log it as your first income, so your balance kicks off in the right spot.
deposit.successBody: Your starting balance is set. You can log income and expenses any time.

salary.title: What do you pull in each month?
salary.body: Roughly what lands in your pocket monthly — this powers your runway, so you always know how long your money lasts.
salary.label: Average monthly salary
salary.hint: Used to estimate your runway. You can change it later in Settings.

onboarding.signUpBody: Right now everything is saved only on this device — clear your browser and it's gone. Create an account to back it up and sync across your devices.

login.title: Sign in to <holo>High Count</holo>
login.subtitle: Your money, tracked — cards, cycles, installments and savings, all in one place.
login.reconsiderTitle: Sure you want to skip signing in?
login.reconsiderBody: You can absolutely use High Count without an account — everything is saved on this device. But signing in backs up your data, syncs it across your devices, and unlocks more features coming soon.

quotes.text: Rule No. 1: Never lose money. Rule No. 2: Never forget rule No. 1.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: Price is what you pay. Value is what you get.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: Someone's sitting in the shade today because someone planted a tree a long time ago.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: Beware of little expenses; a small leak will sink a great ship.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.text: Never spend your money before you have it.
quotes.author: Thomas Jefferson

quotes.text: It is not the man who has too little, but the man who craves more, that is poor.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.text: If a man knows not to which port he sails, no wind is favorable.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.text: Wealth consists not in having great possessions, but in having few wants.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.text: Frugality is a great revenue.
quotes.author: Cicero

quotes.text: A small debt makes a man your debtor; a large one, your enemy.
quotes.author: Publilius Syrus

quotes.text: He who will not economize will have to agonize.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: The investor's chief problem — and even his worst enemy — is likely to be himself.
quotes.author: Benjamin Graham

quotes.text: The first rule of compounding: never interrupt it unnecessarily.
quotes.author: Charlie Munger

quotes.text: Time is your friend; impulse is your enemy.
quotes.author: John C. Bogle

quotes.text: Don't look for the needle in the haystack. Just buy the haystack.
quotes.author: John C. Bogle

quotes.text: Investing should be more like watching paint dry or watching grass grow.
quotes.author: Paul Samuelson

quotes.text: Know what you own, and know why you own it.
quotes.author: Peter Lynch

quotes.text: Saving is the gap between your ego and your income.
quotes.author: Morgan Housel

quotes.text: Wealth is what you don't see.
quotes.author: Morgan Housel

quotes.text: It's not how much money you make, but how much money you keep.
quotes.author: Robert Kiyosaki

quotes.text: You must gain control over your money or the lack of it will forever control you.
quotes.author: Dave Ramsey

quotes.text: Financial peace isn't the acquisition of stuff. It's learning to live on less than you make.
quotes.author: Dave Ramsey

quotes.text: A budget is telling your money where to go instead of wondering where it went.
quotes.author: John C. Maxwell

quotes.text: The habit of saving is itself an education.
quotes.author: T. T. Munger

quotes.text: Wealth is the ability to fully experience life.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.text: Money isn't everything, but it ranks right up there with oxygen.
quotes.author: Zig Ziglar

quotes.text: The quickest way to double your money is to fold it in half and put it in your back pocket.
quotes.author: Will Rogers

quotes.text: Money looks better in the bank than on your feet.
quotes.author: Sophia Amoruso

quotes.text: Empty pockets never held anyone back. Only empty heads and empty hearts can do that.
quotes.author: Norman Vincent Peale

quotes.text: A big part of financial freedom is having your heart and mind free from worry about the what-ifs of life.
quotes.author: Suze Orman
